title: astragalus pulviniformis
intro: Astragalus pulviniformis, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch or Mongolian astragalus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus pulviniformis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and improve overall well-being. It can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
